free_text: Total thermal neutron cross section measurements of
a polyethylene based cold moderator system
Yttrium hydride sample with a diameter of approximately
4.9 cm, thickness of 5 mm and H/Y ratio of 1.85
A 3 mm thick lithium glass detector GS-20 was
placed approximately 15 m away from the target
The LINAC generated 46 MeV electrons at a pulse
repetition rate of 18 Hz and a pulse width of 628 ns.
The TOF clock recorded data with a bin width of 409.6
